channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment: Close bug, has a new update tickegt lu-1374.
I assume this is the case for Lustre 2.1.2 release as well?

James

I think that RHEL5.8 client support missed the cutoff for 2.2 but should land to master soon

Peter
Is RHEL5.8 still supported on Lustre 2.2? I see a patch for it.

Integrated in lustre-b1_8 » i686,client,el6,inkernel #179
LU-1052 kernel: Kernel update [RHEL5.8 2.6.18-308.1.1.el5] (Revision 7abee7f5e32a2ff60bf2890a17ab5431109a9f56)

Result = SUCCESS
Johann Lombardi : 7abee7f5e32a2ff60bf2890a17ab5431109a9f56
